name: Ambiguous: clean partial_order — 4d delay + 6d cover + GOLD at 84h + 2 reliable alts
rubric_notes: The cleanest partial_order case in this batch. GOLD customer deadline (84h) falls within stock cover (144h) but BEFORE primary recovery (96h delay) — order is at material risk if anything slips further. Cost cover comfortable. Decent Alt One is reliable (LOW) and fast (3 days). Rule 5 fires unambiguously: material customer risk + reliable alt → partial_order. acceptable_actions is intentionally singleton — wait_and_monitor would expose the GOLD order to unnecessary risk, and immediate_switch is over-insurance given comfortable stock. The Arbiter should clearly articulate: 'partial order from Decent Alt covers the GOLD deadline; primary remains preferred for the bulk volume.'
